Home
QuickScan
Grade bubble sheets right on your computer · No hardware · No API key
Fernando Díaz, PhD · West Texas A&M University
Getting started
  1. Open the Class tab → create a class (and optionally import its Canvas roster).
  2. Open the Exam tab → add an exam, then set its Answer Key.
  3. Scan → drop scanned bubble sheets to grade them automatically.
  4. Results → review scores, item analysis & reliability, then export.
No hardware and no API key. Everything runs on your computer.
Recent Exams

👥 Class Roster
No roster loaded. Student names will not appear in results.
Exams
Settings
Grading scale, sounds, preferences
✨ New Class
📋 New Exam
ⓘ Enter 1–200 questions. Must match your printed answer sheet (default = 100Q). 101–200 prints & scans as two sheets per student.
✨ New project
A project holds a set of classes and exams, usually a semester, and saves everything to one file that you own. Everything in these classes is saved to that file. You can make another project later for a different semester or set of classes. Only one project is open at a time.
Optional. You can also pick the location when you click Create.
Your project will download as a .qscan file. Keep it somewhere safe. It is your own copy.
